name: Dark passage
hints: A dark passage connecting two important areas. You need light to navigate safely.
NORTH leads to the crypt where Dracula's coffin appears. SOUTH goes to the doorless room.
Go NORTH to reach the crypt (room 6). Go SOUTH to the doorless room (room 10). Bring a lit torch.
notes: Dark passage connecting the crypt (N/room 6) and the doorless room (S/room 10). Hidden behind Dracula's portrait. Light needed for safe navigation.
